title: Wireless LAN Troubleshooting
subtitle: Common WLAN issues and recommended troubleshooting workflow.

items.title: Client Cannot Join WLAN
items.desc: Verify SSID broadcast, WLAN status, AP availability, and client authentication process.
details: Check if SSID is enabled on WLC
Verify AP is joined and broadcasting SSID

items.title: Authentication Failure
items.desc: Check RADIUS reachability, AAA configuration, shared secrets, and user credentials.
details: Verify RADIUS server IP and port

items.title: DHCP Address Issues
items.desc: Confirm DHCP scope availability, VLAN mappings, helper addresses, and IP lease assignment.
details: Ensure DHCP relay (ip helper-address) is set

items.title: Poor Wireless Coverage
items.desc: Review AP placement, signal strength, interference levels, and RF profiles.

items.title: Client Roaming Problems
items.desc: Verify mobility groups, AP neighbor relationships, and fast roaming configuration.

items.title: High Latency or Packet Loss
items.desc: Analyze channel utilization, interference sources, QoS policies, and uplink connectivity.
details: Run ping and packet capture tests

items.title: CAPWAP Join Failure
items.desc: Check controller discovery, DNS resolution, DHCP Option 43, and CAPWAP connectivity.
details: Ensure AP can reach WLC IP

items.title: Controller Reachability Issues
items.desc: Verify routing paths, VLAN configuration, firewall rules, and management interfaces.
